# Travel Suite Web Audit Appendix

- Audit target: `a7b302bcf37e2a70debdf8e73826a5dd4fa8e3fa`

- Scope: `projects/travel-suite/apps/web/src/`

- `npm run lint`: passed
- `npm run typecheck`: passed
- `npx madge --circular --extensions ts,tsx src`: passed (`Processed 1250 files`, `639 warnings`, `No circular dependency found`)

## Notes On Suppressions

- Accepted decisions from the audit brief were treated as suppressions and are not repeated as findings.
- `src/lib/database.types.ts` is the canonical generated schema artifact. It remains in raw size inventories, but was excluded from primary severity scoring to avoid a misleading generated-file `CRITICAL`.
- The raw `missing package imports` heuristic produced false positives from template literals and status strings; the output is preserved below as scan evidence but was not used as a validated finding source.
